payload.body: Audit landed as case-studies/effects-audit.md (commit abdc2e4 on audit/effects branch). TL;DR: io has 13 seed entries, the other 4 built-in effects (mut/async/panic/unsafe) have zero inference. Recommendation in the audit: kill (preferred) or demote to R4002 declared-intent lint. RT-10 can now decide against concrete numbers.
